diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -133,19 +133,18 @@
         # Encoder path

         x0 = self.layer0(x)  # [batch, 64, H/2, W/2]

         x = self.maxpool(x0)  # [batch, 64, H/4, W/4]

-        

         x1 = self.layer1(x)  # [batch, 256, H/4, W/4]

         x2 = self.layer2(x1)  # [batch, 512, H/8, W/8]

         x3 = self.layer3(x2)  # [batch, 1024, H/16, W/16]

         x4 = self.layer4(x3)  # [batch, 2048, H/32, W/32]

         

-        # ASPP module - takes features from layer4 (2048 channels)

+        # ASPP takes features from layer4 (x4) which has 2048 channels

         aspp_out = self.aspp(x4)  # Fixed: Pass x4 instead of x3

         

-        # Decoder - combines ASPP output with low-level features from layer1

-        decoder_out = self.decoder(aspp_out, x1)  # x1 has 256 channels as expected

+        # Decoder takes ASPP output and low-level features from layer1 (x1)

+        output = self.decoder(aspp_out, x1)

         

         # Upsample to original input size

-        output = F.interpolate(decoder_out, size=x.shape[-2:], mode='bilinear', align_corners=False)

+        output = F.interpolate(output, size=x.shape[-2:], mode='bilinear', align_corners=False)

         

         return output
